canonical_form: The girl with the Golden Fish necklace
card_description: The girl with the Golden Fish necklace is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick concludes that his 3-74 experience was a "second pass" of history—a literal time-reversion where God intervened to "remaster" events that had previously gone uncorrected."
